query: SELECT o.id, o.status, o.paymentStatus, o.userId, p.id as paymentId, p.status as paymentStatus, p.slipImageUrl, p.slipSubmittedAt FROM orders o LEFT JOIN payments p ON o.id = p.orderId ORDER BY o.createdAt DESC LIMIT 5;
